description: Calculate the estimated baseline energy consumption for San Francisco buildings and visualize the results by zone using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/energy_baseline.ipynb. Using the datasets in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 and /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/zones.json, determine the total square footage for each building (using building_sqft or calculating it as (residential_units * 800) + non_residential_sqft where missing). Estimate energy consumption (energy_kwh) by applying EUI factors based on year_built: 90 for pre-1980 or NaN, 70 for 1980-1999, 50 for 2000-2009, and 35 for 2010 or newer. Aggregate the total energy consumption and building counts by zone_id. Export the aggregated data to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_energy_baseline.csv and generate a choropleth map of the energy consumption saved to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/energy_map.png.
